title: Tensura: Brewable Arcane Potions
description: Adds a brewing recipe for the newly introduced arcane potions in Tensura: Reincarnated.
body:
A simple mod addon that adds in brewing recipes for the new arcane potions in the Tensura: Reincarnated mod.

Adds in 5 new items, with crafting recipes inspired by base Tensura effects. Finally, you'll have a use for all those magic crystals you've been amassing.
- Infused Silver Dust, made by infusing silver ingots with magic crystals
- Magic Dust, made by combining infused silver dust with glowstone dust and an amethyst shard
- Arcane Crystals, the final craft of the mod, made by combining magic dust with a magic crystal

Supports normal brewing through a brewing stand and refinement through skills like Great Sage.
